title: XRP adds 4,300 new wallets in 24 hours, but why is price stuck?
summary: XRP Ledger activity surges with 4,300 new wallets created in 24 hours, but strong resistance keeps XRP price capped.

title: Polymarket seeks Japan entry despite gambling law hurdles: Report
summary: Polymarket is reportedly seeking entry into Japan amid falling trading volumes and rising regulatory scrutiny, targeting approval by 2030.

title: Mol Shares Drop After Petrochemical Plant Blast in Hungary
summary: Shares in Mol Nyrt., Hungary’s biggest energy group, dropped after an accidental explosion at its petrochemicals plant in eastern Hungary killed one person and injured nine others.

title: S&P 500 on Track for Strongest Earnings Growth Since 2021
summary: The S&P 500 Index is on track for its strongest earnings growth in five years as momentum spreads beyond artificial intelligence-fueled gains to much of corporate America.

title: Morning Minute: Mark Cuban Sells His Bitcoin
summary: The billionaire cited underperformance vs gold and broader disappointment with crypto's breakout apps (or lack thereof) as drivers.

title: Polymarket Hit By ‘Internal Top-Up’ Wallet Exploit, $700K Drained
summary: User funds remain safe after the incident, the prediction market platform said, with contracts and core infrastructure unaffected.

title: House Oversight chair launches probe into insider trading on Kalshi and Polymarket
summary: House Oversight Chairman Comer probes insider trading on Kalshi and Polymarket, sending letters to both CEOs with a June 5 document deadline.

title: ‘No longer a distant place’: F2Pool Co-founder Chun Wang joins SpaceX’s 2-year mission to Mars
summary: Wang will board Starship on a two-year mission that will explore outside the Earth-Moon system and conduct a fly-by of Mars.
